_comment: Shipped preset for the Qwen3 4B local LLM as Storyboard Stage's backend. Same template as text/local-qwen3-4b but tuned for the 16-field-per-shot shotlist: use_default_template=false (StoryboardStage already wraps the user premise in a ChatML system+user prompt so the LLM shouldn't re-template), max_length bumped to 6144 (15+ shots can easily blow past 2048 tokens). Read ONCE on first DB row creation.
label: Local Qwen3 4B Storyboard
description: Qwen3 4B as a structured-shotlist LLM. StoryboardStage builds the 16-field ChatML prompt and parses the line-by-line response back into a COMFYTV_STORYBOARD JSON. Requires qwen_3_4b.safetensors in models/text_encoders/.
